hero.title: Your ideas are strategic—and ready to scale
hero.lead: We help leading teams turn vision into AI products—with rigor, speed, and governance.

stages.title: Strategic vision
stages.body: We align AI strategy with business goals and assess readiness across leadership, data, talent, and culture.
stages.note: Not sure your company is ready for AI? This phase gives clarity to start focused and build toward a solid strategy.

stages.title: Viability analysis
stages.body: Identify and prioritize high-impact use cases. We validate opportunities, data readiness, technical fit, and projected return.
stages.note: When everything feels urgent, it’s hard to know where to start. We help you focus on what’s valuable and feasible now.

stages.title: Prototype
stages.body: We build an MVP in weeks to validate with real users, metrics, and quality guardrails.
stages.note: We reduce uncertainty fast: prototypes that learn, measure, and show value without risking operations.

stages.title: Validation
stages.body: We iterate with stakeholder feedback, tests, and observability to harden the product before scaling.
stages.note: We ensure performance, security, and experience before investing in operations and rollout.

stages.title: Scale
stages.body: We standardize MLOps, governance, and operations to grow smoothly—with internal teams or Dantex squads.
stages.note: We move from “it works” to “it always works”: monitoring, cost, compliance, and continuous improvement.

objectives.title: Your goals, amplified by our experience
bullets: Senior squads with experience across product, data, and AI engineering.
Governance and security frameworks aligned to enterprise standards.
Architecture and MLOps designed to evolve without hidden technical debt.
objectives.imageAlt: Team collaborating with notes on a glass board

packages.title: Smart packages to define your next AI move
packages.lead: Choose the pace and depth that fit your context—from strategic clarity to a continuous innovation hub.

items.name: AI Sprint
points: A working prototype in weeks—not months
Demo with quality and adoption metrics

caseStudies.title: Real stories powered by Lab sessions

cases.title: From scattered data to an operational copilot in retail
Intelligent automation in a global logistics chain

faq.title: Answers to your strategic questions
faq.lead: Transparency from day one: scope, risks, and realistic expectations about what AI can deliver for your business.

items.q: How long does a typical Lab engagement take?
items.a: It depends on the package—from a two-week sprint to multi-month programs with biweekly deliveries and shared governance.

items.q: Do you work with our stack and cloud provider?
items.a: Yes. We integrate with AWS, Azure, and GCP—and respect your organization’s identity, networking, and secrets policies.

items.q: How do you protect sensitive data and IP?
items.a: We use confidentiality agreements, isolated environments when needed, and no-retention processing options depending on the use case.

items.q: What should we prepare before the first session?
items.a: A business sponsor, access to high-level product/data documentation, and a prioritized list of questions or hypotheses.

contact.title: Let’s build AI solutions with real impact
contact.quote: “The Lab helped us prioritize three use cases with clear ROI—and a prototype now in pilot with customers.”
